Text.Name: SpecialZhen
Text.Title: Formation
Text.Desc: Combine the strength of people into one. Such is the ultimate truth about the way of formations.

Text.Name: SpecialElixirGas
Text.Title: Alchemy Qi
Text.Desc: The Alchemy Qi in the Sect

Text.Name: SpecialMutation
Text.Notes: Panel for Comments on Heavenly Chaos
Text.Title: Heavenly Chaos
Text.Desc: The Heavenly Dao in this realm has entered its final stage, further destabilizing the already chaotic heavenly laws
